text.title: Vector DB Dev Setup — Failure Modes

failure-mode.description: :latest tag — silent version drift; week-old setup differs from teammate's.
failure-mode.repair: Pin to major.minor; document in dev-setup.yaml.

failure-mode.description: Ephemeral volume — `docker rm` wipes all data; team re-ingests every restart.
Client version mismatch — `search returns []` even though data is there.
failure-mode.detector: pip freeze shows client version different major.minor from image_tag
failure-mode.repair: Pin client to server version. Verify wire-format compatibility.

failure-mode.description: No smoke test — dev debugs pipeline for hours; turns out collection name typo.
failure-mode.repair: Run `verify-dev.py` on every new dev environment; commit a passing fixture.

failure-mode.description: Data dir committed — `git status` shows 2GB of qdrant_storage staged.
failure-mode.detector: git check-ignore reports data dir not ignored
failure-mode.repair: Add data dir to .gitignore. Remove from history with git filter-repo if already committed.
